requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — IEC Type 2 / CCS2 vs GB/T
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——IEC Type 2 / CCS2与GB/T
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——IEC Type 2 / CCS2與GB/T

summary.en: Saint Lucia's UK / IEC electrical legacy and 50 Hz utility environment point toward IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC charging and CCS2 for DC fast charging, not the North American SAE J1772 / CCS1 direction. Type 2 and CCS2 become practical requirements where specified by SLBS, LUCELEC, a public tender, hotel operator, fleet owner, or charge-point operator. A pilot network should align with IEC 62196 from the start to avoid vehicle and spare-part fragmentation.
summary.zh: 圣卢西亚具有英国/IEC电气传统和50 Hz公用电力环境，接口方向应为交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2，而不是北美SAE J1772 / CCS1。当SLBS、LUCELEC、公共招标、酒店运营商、车队业主或充电点运营商提出要求时，Type 2和CCS2即成为实务要求。试点网络应从一开始即采用IEC 62196体系，以避免车辆和备件碎片化。
summary.zht: 聖露西亞具有英國/IEC電氣傳統和50 Hz公用電力環境，接口方向應為交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2，而不是北美SAE J1772 / CCS1。當SLBS、LUCELEC、公共招標、酒店運營商、車隊業主或充電點運營商提出要求時，Type 2和CCS2即成為實務要求。試點網絡應從一開始即採用IEC 62196體系，以避免車輛和備件碎片化。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-3 — CCS2 DC and AC/DC vehicle couplers

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and China DC chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers with GB/T 27930 communication. GB/T AC couplers differ from IEC Type 2 in connector gender and signaling, and GB/T DC couplers are physically and protocol-incompatible with CCS2. China-side GB/T connector evidence is not accepted as an IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 substitute for Saint Lucia projects.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，中国直流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器并使用GB/T 27930通信。GB/T交流接口与IEC Type 2在接口性别和信号上不同，GB/T直流接口与CCS2在物理和协议上不兼容。中国侧GB/T接口证据不能作为圣卢西亚项目IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2的替代。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，中國直流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器並使用GB/T 27930通訊。GB/T交流接口與IEC Type 2在接口性別和信號上不同，GB/T直流接口與CCS2在物理和協議上不兼容。中國側GB/T接口證據不能作為聖露西亞項目IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2的替代。

gap.en: A GB/T-only charger requires hardware redesign before Saint Lucia deployment: coupler, cable assembly, locking, proximity and control-pilot circuits, DC communication stack, labels, temperature-rise evidence, and spare parts must be converted to IEC Type 2 / CCS2. Adapters should not be treated as a project-compliant solution. Confirm connector requirements before quoting because a small island market can be locked into the wrong ecosystem quickly.
gap.zh: 仅支持GB/T的充电桩在圣卢西亚部署前需要硬件重新设计：耦合器、电缆组件、锁止、接近导引和控制导引电路、直流通信栈、标签、温升证据及备件均须转换为IEC Type 2 / CCS2。不应将转接器视为项目合规方案。报价前须确认接口要求，因为小岛市场很容易被错误生态锁定。
gap.zht: 僅支持GB/T的充電樁在聖露西亞部署前需要硬體重新設計：耦合器、電纜組件、鎖止、接近導引和控制導引電路、直流通訊棧、標籤、溫升證據及備件均須轉換為IEC Type 2 / CCS2。不應將轉接器視為項目合規方案。報價前須確認接口要求，因為小島市場很容易被錯誤生態鎖定。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where specified by SLBS, LUCELEC, tender, vehicle fleet, hotel owner, or charge-point operator; GB/T is physically incompatible with IEC Type 2 / CCS2
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Saint Lucia projects should be specified around IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC and CCS2 for DC. GB/T connectors are not compatible with that ecosystem, so conversion is a hardware and protocol redesign rather than a label change.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 圣卢西亚项目宜按交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2进行规格定义。GB/T接口与该生态不兼容，因此转换是硬件和协议重新设计，而非标签变更。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 聖露西亞項目宜按交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2進行規格定義。GB/T接口與該生態不兼容，因此轉換是硬體和協議重新設計，而非標籤變更。
